name: Louisiana Ring Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the topping first by mixing all ingredients together and spreading in the bottom of a well-greased tube pan.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt; add sugar. Mix well.
3. Cut in shortening; add milk, extracts, and eggs. Beat thoroughly.
4. Pour batter over the topping and bake in a 370 degree oven for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
5. Remove from pan immediately or topping will stick to pan.
